text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the year-end race, the Arima Kinen. The day
Tokai Teio has been waiting for has finally come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She enthusiastically explains how she hopes that
defeating Symboli Rudolf will begin to change her
fans' image of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio heads to the race like her usual
energetic self.
